hero.headline:
Your Sacramento Pool, Our Weekly
Commitment
hero.subheadline: Cap City Pools is a family-owned Sacramento pool service that shows up every week like clockwork. No contracts, no surprise charges, and a detailed service report after every visit — so you always know exactly what was done.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Reliable Pool Care Tailored to<br class="hidden md:block"> Your Sacramento Home
services.subtitle: From chemical balancing to full-service maintenance, Cap City Pools handles everything so you can enjoy your backyard without lifting a finger.

cards.title: Chemical Service
cards.description: Weekly chemical testing and balancing with thorough equipment checks. You receive a detailed service report emailed after every visit — total transparency.

cards.title: Semi Full Service
cards.description: Everything in Chemical Service plus skimmer and cleaner bag emptying, pump basket cleaning, ongoing equipment maintenance, and tile and step brushing.

cards.title: Full Service
cards.description: The complete package — all Semi Full Service features plus debris netting, energy bowl cleaning, and unlimited service calls for total peace of mind.

cards.title: Equipment Diagnostics
cards.description: Pumps acting up? Heater not firing? Our CPO-certified techs diagnose problems fast and get your equipment running right — often in a single visit.

cards.title: Green Pool Recovery
cards.description: Sacramento heat can turn a pool green fast. We bring it back to crystal clear with aggressive treatment and follow-up visits until it stays clean.

cards.title: Pool Start-Up & Winterization
cards.description: Seasonal opening and closing done right. We prep your pool for summer fun or winter rest so nothing gets damaged while you're not looking.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Sign Up in Minutes
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and choose your service level. We keep it simple — no long forms, no sales pressure, and your first month is on us.

steps.title: We Show Up Every Week
steps.description: Our trained technicians arrive on your scheduled day, every week, without fail. After each visit you get a service report emailed straight to your inbox.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal Clear Water
steps.description: Your pool stays swim-ready all season long. If something ever isn't right, one call and we're back out — no extra charge, no questions asked.

about.label: Why Sacramento Trusts Cap City Pools
about.headline: Family-Owned, Locally Operated, Personally Invested
about.description: David founded Cap City Pools in 2019 with a simple belief: pool service should be reliable, transparent, and personal. Seven years later, that same hands-on approach drives every visit. We treat every customer's pool as if it were our own — because our reputation in Sacramento depends on it. No corporate call centers, no revolving door of strangers. Just a dedicated local team that knows your pool by name.

features.title: Trained Technicians Every Visit
features.description: Every tech on your property is fully trained and CPO-certified. No temps, no shortcuts — just skilled professionals who know pools inside and out.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your business every single week. Month-to-month service with zero cancellation fees — stay because you want to, not because you have to.

features.title: Service Reports After Every Visit
features.description: You get a detailed email after each service showing exactly what was tested, adjusted, and completed. Full transparency, every time.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no cancellation fees, ever.

guarantee.headline: Our "Show Up or It's Free" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We promise to show up on your scheduled service day, every single week. If we ever miss a visit without rescheduling in advance, that week's service is free. And if you're not happy with any visit, we come back and make it right at no extra charge — no questions asked. That's the Cap City Pools commitment.

faqs.question: How quickly can I get started with service?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are up and running within a few days. We keep the sign-up process quick and easy — just tell us about your pool, pick your plan, and we'll schedule your first visit. Your first month is free so you can see the difference before paying a dime.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our Sacramento customers provide gate access and go about their day. After each visit, you'll receive a detailed service report via email so you always know exactly what was done — even when you're not there.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every Cap City Pools technician is CPO-certified (Certified Pool Operator), fully trained, and insured. We're also BBB Accredited. You'll never get an untrained temp showing up at your pool.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees. We don't do contracts or cancellation penalties — ever. We believe in earning your trust every week, and if we're not the right fit, parting ways should be painless.

faqs.question: What areas in Sacramento do you service?
faqs.answer: We serve the greater Sacramento region including Carmichael, Citrus Heights, Fair Oaks, Orangevale, Rancho Cordova, Folsom, Roseville, Elk Grove, and Natomas. If you're nearby, there's a good chance we can help — just reach out.

testimonials.name: Emma G.
testimonials.text: Cap City Pools is a consistent 10+ on a scale of five stars! Each week the technician shows up on time and equipped with supplies. They never cut corners — I couldn't be happier with the service.

testimonials.name: Lindsay P.
testimonials.text: I've been a customer for over a year and I'm beyond impressed with their communication and professionalism. David and the team go above and beyond to keep my pool maintained properly. Highly recommend Cap City Pools!

testimonials.name: Adam E.
testimonials.text: When our pool pump failed right before the 4th of July, David came out, assessed the problem, and got the replacement done a week early. They saved our holiday weekend — the best pool service in Sacramento.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Runs Itself?
contact.subtitle: Get a free quote and your first month free. No contracts, no pressure — just reliable pool care from a family that takes it personally.
benefits: Free first month of pool service

footer.description: Family-owned pool service proudly serving Sacramento since 2019.
